violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Remove plastic film from alto sham. -Shelves in chicken cooler are rusted.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside all coolers.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean all shelving, racks and carts in kitchen. -Clean fronts and handles of all coolers and warmers. -Clean fan covers in walk in cooler.
Prep/vegetable sink. — --Prep sink was not plumbed with a physical air gap on the drain line. -Need to elevate drain pipe so it sits above the floor level.
